name: sanxingdui-archaeology-ar
description: 三星堆考古挖掘→AI修复→AR戴脸完整体验系统

scripts.share: concurrently -k -n api,frontend,tunnel -c green,blue,cyan "npm run server" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5174" "cloudflared tunnel --protocol http2 --edge-ip-version 4 --url http://127.0.0.1:5174"
